zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibyl Marshal於大約1213年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾倫頓時，她的父親John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham45歲，母親Aline Rie29歲。她於大約1230年與Sir William de Say III結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1270年在奧地利享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibyl Marshal于大约1213年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾倫頓时，她的父亲John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham45岁，母亲Aline Rie29岁。她于大约1230年与Sir William de Say III结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1270年在奥地利享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marshal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Marshall  .

variants.name: Marshall
meanings: English: usually an occupational name ‘farrier’, occasionally a status name ‘chief official of a royal household or court; a high officer of state’, from Middle English mareshal and Old French maresc(h)al. An even wider range of meanings is found in some other languages: compare for example Polish Marszałek (see Marszalek ). This name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century. It is also borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibyl Marshal was born about 1213, in Lenton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham, was 45 and her mother, Aline Rie, was 29. She married Sir William de Say III about 1230. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1270, in Austria, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibyl Marshal est née environ 1213, à Lenton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Aline Rie, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Say III environ 1230. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1270, à Autriche, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibyl Marshal um 1213 in Lenton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham 45 und ihre Mutter Aline Rie 29. Sie hat um 1230 Sir William de Say III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1270 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Österreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl Marshal è nata il circa 1213 nel Lenton, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Aline Rie, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir William de Say III circa 1230. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1270, nel Austria, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibyl Marshalが約1213年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアレントンで生まれた時，父John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hinghamは45歳，母Aline Rieは29歳であった。約1230年にSir William de Say IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1270年にオーストリアで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl Marshal(이)가 대략 1213년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 렌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aline Rie(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1230년 Sir William de Say III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1270년 오스트리아에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl Marshal nasceu aproximadamente 1213, em Lenton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Aline Rie, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Say III aproximadamente 1230. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1270, em Áustria, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibyl Marshal родилась около 1213 г. в местности лентон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline Rie, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Say III около 1230 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1270 г. в местности Австрия в возрасте 59 лет.

sm.about 1213–about 1270: e tusa o le 1213–e tusa o le 1270

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibyl Marshal nació aproximadamente 1213, en Lenton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Zeta Marshal 1st Baron Marshal of Hingham, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Aline Rie, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir William de Say III aproximadamente 1230. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1270, en Austria, a la edad de 59 años.
